ab: malim anga ken a kemacu ta ku inpic.
en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: ku pasedjamay.
en: I can lend you.

ab: malim anga ken a kemacu ta ku qecap.
en: A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: inika ken a nakemacu, vaiki a kiveli.
en: B: I don't have one either, let's go buy one.

ab: makaya vaik itjen a kiveli ta inpic?
en: A: Let's go buy a pen, shall we?

ab: ui, uri veneli anan aken ta si’uli’ulip.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.

ab: ari vaiki a kiveli ta kenamain?
en: A: Come on, let's go get some breakfast, shall we?

ab: caqen, nakeman anga ken i tjumaq.
en: B: No, I've already eaten at home.

ab: malim anga ken a semljec ta ku bintu.
en: A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.

ab: pakirimu a vaik a semljec.
en: B: Take it to the heat!

ab: malim anga ken a kemacu ta ku bintu.
en: A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ab: pai kani a madrua ta ku bintu.
ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let's eat my lunch box together!

ab: uri anema su kanen nu kingcengecengelj?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: keman aken ta cengelj i gakku.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.

ab: anema uri su kanen nu kincengelj?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: nakemacu aken ta bintu, kanianga madrusa.
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I've brought a lunchbox today, let's eat together at noon!

ab: ari, vaiki a benuru?
en: A: Come on, let's go play basketball, shall we?

ab: pariya! ari vaiki.
en: B: Okay! Let's go.

ab: ari vaiki a benuru?
en: A: Shall we go play baseball?

ab: caqen, uri semupu aken.
en: B: No, I want to study.

ab: alapan aken ta ljaljumay.
en: A: Please help me with the broom.

ab: ui, ku sipavayan tjanusun aicu a ljaljumay.
en: B: Okay, here's a broomstick for you.

ab: pai alapan aken ta zuking?
en: A: Can you get me a rag, please?

ab: semuasuap aken, alapan aken ayau ti kui.
en: B: I'm sweeping the floor, you ask Kui to help you.

ab: makasuapanga sun?
en: A: Are you done sweeping?

ab: makasuapanga ken.
en: B: I swept it.

ab: aku sun a inika semuap?
en: A: Why don't you clean up?

ab: makasuapanga ken.
en: B: I've finished cleaning up.

ab: qiljaqiljan aicu a kasintan, sau zukinguanan.
en: A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.

ab: ui, vaik aken a malap ta zuking.
en: B: Okay, I'll go get the cloth.

ab: qiljaqiljan azua ’ezung, sau zukinguanan.
ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: mayanan, ini anan aku makasuap tai maza.
ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I'm not done sweeping here yet.

ab: uri kemuda sun nusauni?
en: A: What are you doing later?

ab: uri vaik aken a karim tjai sinsi.
en: B: I'm going to see my teacher.

ab: nu nakemasi gakku sun uri kemudad sun?
en: A: What do you do after school?

ab: uri vaik amen kata ku salasalad a semenay.
en: B: I'm going to sing with my friends.

ab: nu nakemasi gakku timadju uri kemuda?
en: A: What's he doing after school?

ab: uri vaik a ljemanguy timadju.
en: B: He's going to go swimming.
